sections.heading: Our Rwanda Offer
sections.body: Studex works directly with cooperative washing stations in Rwanda to source exceptional arabica coffees at competitive prices. All lots are hand-sorted, fully washed, and exported from Djibouti.

sections.heading: Current Stock — Rwanda Wet Polished
sections.note: Cupping score A1: 84+. Very low cup defects. Clean, bright acidity with stone fruit sweetness.

sections.heading: What We Arrange
checks: Sample shipments (5–10kg) prior to bulk commitment
Private label packaging — your brand on our green coffee
Flexible incoterms: FOB Djibouti, CIF, DAP to destination
Full documentation: phytosanitary certificates, COA, fumigation records
Cupping sessions via video call before shipment

sections.heading: Recommended Next Steps
sections.body:
We suggest a 30-minute call this week to review cupping samples, clarify your grade and packaging requirements, and agree on delivery terms for your first order.

I am available on WhatsApp for immediate communication: +27 83 593 2577.
